summary: Backend + frontend regression for FX/metals rate tracking, multi-currency support, and FLUM logo. 15/15 backend pytest pass including USD/EUR/XAU conversion accuracy on /api/dashboard/summary. Frontend: RatesTicker + /kurlar page + rate cards + refresh work, sidebar/auth logos render, receivable-currency and expense-currency selectors work. Found and FIXED one critical crash on /hesaplar (BankAccounts) due to missing Select/CURRENCIES/formatAmount imports.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED — Missing imports of Select* + CURRENCIES + formatAmount caused ReferenceError: Select is not defined; page crashed with 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay as soon as user navigated to /hesaplar. Bank creation modal, bank-currency selector and TRY-converted total were entirely inaccessible before fix.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer width(-1)/height(-1) warning persists on initial mount (pre-existing, non-blocking)

passed: GET /api/rates returns cached rates with USD~47.21, EUR~53.85, XAU/g~6282, XAG/g~90 (all within sanity ranges)
POST /api/rates/refresh re-fetches and updates cache; fetched_at present
POST /api/receivables with currency='USD' persists; dashboard total_receivable_pending increases by exactly amount * USD/TRY (within 2% tolerance)
POST /api/expenses with currency='EUR' persists; dashboard total_expense_pending reflects EUR/TRY conversion
POST /api/bank-accounts with currency='XAU' persists; dashboard total_bank_balance reflects XAU/g conversion
Frontend: brand-logo-auth (FLUM white) visible on Login and Register
Frontend: brand-logo (FLUM black) visible in sidebar
Frontend: rates-ticker on dashboard shows ticker-USD='₺47,21', ticker-EUR='₺53,85', ticker-XAU='₺6.282,67', ticker-XAG='₺90,94'
refresh-rates-button on /kurlar triggers POST /api/rates/refresh and shows 'Kurlar güncellendi' toast
Sidebar nav-rates navigates to /kurlar (active state visible)
receivable-currency selector present with 5 options: TRY, USD, EUR, XAU (Altın gram), XAG (Gümüş gram)
expense-currency selector present in Expenses modal
bank-currency selector present in BankAccounts modal with 5 options (after fix)
action_items: OPTIONAL: PUT endpoints (receivables/expenses) still require full payload — a partial 'mark as paid' PUT would return 422. Same issue was flagged in iteration_1 and remains not fixed. Verify frontend paid-toggle sends the full body.
OPTIONAL: silence Recharts width/height warning on Dashboard by setting min-height on the container.
critical_code_review_comments: BankAccounts.jsx was shipped with missing Select/CURRENCIES/formatAmount imports — clear indication that lint/type-checks aren't enforced on save. Recommend adding an ESLint rule 'react/jsx-no-undef' + 'no-undef' in CI to catch this class of regression.
server.py file (~720 lines) is approaching the split-file threshold; suggest breaking receivables/expenses/bank/cards/todos into per-resource routers.
rates.py uses synchronous 'requests' inside asyncio.to_thread — OK, but a native httpx.AsyncClient would be more idiomatic and cheaper.

convert_to_try silently returns 0.0 when rate missing for non-TRY currency — this can mask outages in the dashboard summary. Consider surfacing a 'stale_rates' flag in the summary response so the UI can warn.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/BankAccounts.jsx (added missing imports of Select components, CURRENCIES, formatAmount)
seed_data_creation: Test resources are prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up in test_zzz_cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate provider (fawazahmed0 CDN) is reachable from the container. USD/EUR/XAU/XAG all populated. If /api/rates ever returns 502, tests skip gracefully instead of failing. Frontend BankAccounts page was broken pre-test; the fix has been applied — please spot-check after any refactor of the currency selector.
rca of the issue: Root cause of /hesaplar crash: BankAccounts.jsx used <Select>, <SelectTrigger>, <SelectContent>, <SelectItem>, <SelectValue>, CURRENCIES and formatAmount without importing them. React threw ReferenceError: Select is not defined during render, showing the CRA runtime error overlay. Reproduction: log in as admin, click 'Banka Hesapları' — page crashed instantly. Mitigation: added the exact same imports already present in Receivables.jsx (Select components + CURRENCIES + formatAmount). Confirmed by re-navigating to /hesaplar (no crash), opening Yeni Hesap dialog, and enumerating 5 currency options in bank-currency.
